creator: wg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, this is an update of py-setuptools from 1.x to 2.0.
	Besides the major version there shouldn't be any major API change.
	As this ports affects other ~1.8k ports I thought it deserved an exp-run before the update however I'm not so sure that is the way to go. Let me know if you think thats not necessary.

Fix: 

Please find it at: http://people.freebsd.org/~wg/setuptools-2.0.txt
